title: Ahead of SpaceX IPO, Elon Musk addresses ASML employees as part of push into chip manufacturing
summary_full: Elon Musk called ASML a great company in a fireside chat with CEO Christophe Fouquet, as the SpaceX CEO gears up to go big in chip manufacturing.
summary_public: Elon Musk called ASML a great company in a fireside chat with CEO Christophe Fouquet, as the SpaceX CEO gears up to go big in chip manufacturing.
